chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD CP No. D- 1615 of 2012 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 03.09.2019 For hearing of MA 7312/12 For hearing of main case None present Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Addl.A.G. along with Din Muhammad Pathan DEO (P) Shaheed Benazirabad No one is present on behalf of petitioners and no intimation is received. We have seen that since filing of this petition no much interest has been taken by the petitioners and their counsel to pursue this petition as is reflected from the order sheets. Accordingly this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
